prompt:
A young adult East Asian woman standing in an outdoor tropical urban environment, half-body to three-quarter vertical composition, with her body turned about two-thirds away from the camera and her head turned back to look at the camera in a natural over-the-shoulder gaze. She has a slender and elongated figure with soft shoulder and back lines, and her skin is fair with warm tones, preserving real pores, fine texture, and natural highlights; no plastic skin smoothing. She has thick, deep brown long curly hair, voluminous and naturally fluffy, gently blown by the breeze and falling along her back. Exquisite features, almond eyes, soft eyebrow shape, a slender nose bridge, natural lips, light makeup, and a calm, confident expression with subtle, restrained micro-expressions.

Clothing is light beige/oatmeal colored resort wear: a thin-strap backless swimsuit or bikini top with clearly visible back ties; a cream-colored crochet lace wrap or cover-up skirt around the waist, lightweight with clear woven texture. The background is a high-end urban outdoor landscape with blurred palm trees, modern high-rises, and some greenery, creating a transparent space. Lighting is soft natural daylight with a slight grey tone, overall low saturation, low contrast, natural skin tones, and a strong sense of airiness. Photography style: 85mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field, focus clearly on the eyes and face, soft blurred background, high-end fashion vacation portrait, realistic photography quality.
 Avoid: Cartoon feel, CG feel, excessive skin smoothing, deformed arms, incorrect fingers, exaggerated bust-to-waist ratio, cluttered background, overly vivid colors, text, watermarks, logos.
promptEn:
A young adult East Asian woman standing in an outdoor tropical urban environment, half-body to three-quarter vertical composition, with her body turned about two-thirds away from the camera and her head turned back to look at the camera in a natural over-the-shoulder gaze. She has a slender and elongated figure with soft shoulder and back lines, and her skin is fair with warm tones, preserving real pores, fine texture, and natural highlights; no plastic skin smoothing. She has thick, deep brown long curly hair, voluminous and naturally fluffy, gently blown by the breeze and falling along her back. Exquisite features, almond eyes, soft eyebrow shape, a slender nose bridge, natural lips, light makeup, and a calm, confident expression with subtle, restrained micro-expressions.

Clothing is light beige/oatmeal colored resort wear: a thin-strap backless swimsuit or bikini top with clearly visible back ties; a cream-colored crochet lace wrap or cover-up skirt around the waist, lightweight with clear woven texture. The background is a high-end urban outdoor landscape with blurred palm trees, modern high-rises, and some greenery, creating a transparent space. Lighting is soft natural daylight with a slight grey tone, overall low saturation, low contrast, natural skin tones, and a strong sense of airiness. Photography style: 85mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field, focus clearly on the eyes and face, soft blurred background, high-end fashion vacation portrait, realistic photography quality.
 Avoid: Cartoon feel, CG feel, excessive skin smoothing, deformed arms, incorrect fingers, exaggerated bust-to-waist ratio, cluttered background, overly vivid colors, text, watermarks, logos.
promptZh:
一位年轻的东亚女性 站在户外热带城市环境中，采用半身至四分之三竖构图，身体背对镜头约三分之二，头部回转，自然地越过肩头看向镜头。她拥有纤细修长的身材，肩背线条柔和，肤色白皙且带有暖调，保留真实的毛孔、细腻的纹理和自然的肤色高光；拒绝塑料感的磨皮效果。她留着浓密深棕色的长卷发，发量丰盈且自然蓬松，在微风中轻轻飘动，垂落在背部。五官精致，杏眼，眉形柔和，鼻梁挺拔，唇形自然，妆容清淡，表情从容自信，带有细微而克制的表情变化。

服装为 浅米色/燕麦色度假风服饰：细肩带露背泳衣或比基尼上衣，背部系带清晰可见；腰间围着米色钩针蕾丝罩衫或围裙，材质轻盈，编织纹理清晰。背景为高端城市户外景观，点缀着模糊的棕榈树、现代高层建筑和部分绿植，营造出通透的空间感。光线为柔和的自然日光，略带灰色调，整体低饱和度、低对比度，肤色自然，空气感十足。摄影风格：85mm 人像镜头，浅景深，焦点清晰对准眼睛和面部，背景虚化柔和，高端时尚度假人像，写实摄影画质。
 避免：卡通感、CG 感、过度磨皮、手臂畸形、手指错误、夸张的胸腰比、背景杂乱、色彩过于艳丽、文字、水印、Logo。
